title: CocoSori
summary: CocoSori (Korean: 코코소리) was a South Korean duo formed by Mole Entertainment. They debuted on January 5, 2016, with the single "Dark Circle". On February 1, 2019, through a direct statement from Mole Entertainment, CocoSori was announced to have disbanded due to internal conflicts with member Coco.
text:
CocoSori (Korean: 코코소리) was a South Korean duo formed by Mole Entertainment. They debuted on January 5, 2016, with the single "Dark Circle". On February 1, 2019, through a direct statement from Mole Entertainment, CocoSori was announced to have disbanded due to internal conflicts with member Coco.

Single albums
